parameters.jsCode:
const submitUrl = 'https://n8n.amprosystem.com/webhook/telegram-mini-app-submit'; const html = " Quotation Request

Quotation Request

Enter the required details and upload the BOQ and specification files. The generated DOCX will be sent back in this Telegram chat.

Client details

Project details

Quotation details

Files

".replace('__SUBMIT_URL__', submitUrl); return [{ json: { html } }];

parameters.content:
## Telegram Quotation Mini App

Layer 1 Telegram workflow. Receives Bot API webhook updates, serves the Telegram Mini App, accepts Mini App uploads, and starts the existing RAGM quotation pipeline.

Config is env-driven where available: `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`, `TELEGRAM_MINI_APP_URL`, `TELEGRAM_SUBMIT_URL`, `RAGM_BACKEND_API_URL`, `RAGM_TENANT_SLUG`, `RAGM_LOGIN_EMAIL`, `RAGM_LOGIN_PASSWORD`, `N8N_PIPELINE_CALLBACK_URL`.

meta.description: Layer 1 Telegram platform workflow using Telegram Mini App intake.
